mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(final_price),0) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT p.name AS label, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.price) AS value FROM order_item oi JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT status AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM orders GROUP BY status
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS label, SUM(total_price) AS value FROM orders WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY label
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at,'%Y-%m') AS label, SUM(total_price) AS value FROM orders GROUP BY label ORDER BY label
